lessons.title: Fetch API and Promises
lessons.description: Learn how to make network requests using the Fetch API and understand Promises.

lessons.title: Async/Await and Error Handling
lessons.description: Write cleaner asynchronous code with async/await and handle errors gracefully.

lessons.title: Loading States and Displaying Data
lessons.description: Manage loading indicators and render fetched data in components.

lessons.title: POST Requests and Sending Data
lessons.description: Send data to an API using POST requests with JSON bodies.

lessons.title: Using Axios and Advanced Patterns
lessons.description: Explore the Axios library for more features and request/response interceptors.
